creator: keramida@ceid.upatras.gr
text:
On 2007-02-05 19:24, NIIMI Satoshi <sa2c@sa2c.net> wrote:
>2007/1/28, Giorgos Keramidas <keramida@freebsd.org>:
>>I'm test-building this right now.  I'll ask one of our ports committers
>>to "cvs commit" it shortly after the tests are done.
>
> How are the tests results?
> I've been using the patched port and experienced no problem.

There is a packaging plist bug, which I'm trying to solve, but other
than that the tests have worked fine on FreeBSD/i386 here.
